name: Simple Oven-Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and pat-dry chicken pieces.
2. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
3. Mix together salt, pepper, bread crumbs, and cornstarch thoroughly.
4. Dip each piece of chicken into the melted butter, then into the bread crumb mixture.
5. Place the chicken pieces skin-side down in a shallow baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
7. Turn each piece skin-side up and continue cooking for another 25 minutes, or until well-browned and easily pierced with a fork.
8. Serve immediately.
